title: Script 73
description: System does not allow capitalization if capitalization date (Put to use) field in Asset Master is of previous quarter(s). Manual approval of Finance controllers and Head - Accounts is required to give temporary access to specific user to capitalize asset in previous quarter. System automatically calculates depreciation on Fixed Asset Register (Tangible/Intangible) basis depreciation rate / asset useful life included in the asset master defined in the system on depreciation run. System picks up the useful life basis defined depreciation key for respective asset class and manual intervention to change the useful life and depreciation start date is restricted. System restricts depreciation calculation in excess of book value.
